title: JavaScript Asset
description: JavaScript code asset, deliverable inline (code as a string) or by URL (third-party tag URL). The optional `delivery_type` follows the VAST/DAAST naming convention; absence implies inline for backwards compatibility with v1 producers.

asset_type.description: Discriminator identifying this as a JavaScript asset. See /schemas/creative/asset-types for the registry.

accessibility.description: Self-declared accessibility properties for this opaque creative

alt_text.description: Text alternative describing the creative content

keyboard_navigable.description: Whether the creative can be fully operated via keyboard

motion_control.description: Whether the creative respects prefers-reduced-motion or provides pause/stop controls

screen_reader_tested.description: Whether the creative has been tested with screen readers

provenance.description: Provenance metadata for this asset, overrides manifest-level provenance

oneOf.title: Inline JavaScript content
oneOf.description: JavaScript code delivered as a string. Default when `delivery_type` is absent (v1-compatible).

delivery_type.description: Optional discriminator. Absence is treated as inline.

oneOf.title: URL-delivered JavaScript
oneOf.description: JavaScript served at a URL endpoint (e.g., third-party display tag, externally-hosted JS bundle).

delivery_type.description: Discriminator indicating JavaScript is delivered via URL endpoint.

url.description: URL endpoint that serves the JavaScript content (third-party tag URL, hosted bundle, etc.).
